data.name: Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming

Fasten your seatbelt and get ready for a flight you won’t forget.
Airi, a stunning flight attendant with a sweet smile and a naughty sparkle in her eyes, is live and ready to make your journey unforgettable. Professional on the surface, playful underneath, she turns every click into a teasing moment filled with charm and temptation.

From elegant poses to mischievous glances, Airi knows exactly how to keep her passengers’ attention at cruising altitude. ✈️✨

✈️ About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with a stylish and cheeky flight attendant fantasy.
Each click brings you closer to Airi, unlocking new uniforms, graceful animations, and flirty reactions that reveal what’s hiding behind her perfect service smile.

Collect hearts to progress through different stages of the flight, upgrade your abilities, and discover just how playful this hostess can be when the cabin doors are closed. 😉

🎉 Features

✈️ Elegant Airline Atmosphere – Modern cabin, soft lighting, and premium vibes.
💙 Playful Flight Attendant – Polite, charming, and subtly provocative.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Easy to play, deeply satisfying.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From classic uniform to bolder, flirtier looks.
🔊 Voice Acting & Reactions – Sweet lines, teasing laughs, and attentive responses.
🚀 Progression System – Stack hearts and unlock new moments mid-flight.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you enjoy classy characters, light teasing, and seductive atmosphere, Airi is the perfect travel companion.
She doesn’t just serve drinks — she knows how to raise the temperature with elegance. 😏

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap gets Airi’s attention.
🔓 Unlock Outfits & Scenes – Spend hearts to reveal new moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Speed up progression and enjoy the flight faster.

🎉 Ready for Takeoff?

The flight is live.
The crew is ready.
And Airi loves attentive passengers.

Board Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming and let the journey take off. ✈️✨

data.short_description: ✈️ Step aboard Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming 😏 Click to collect ❤️, unlock stylish flight attendant outfits, and enjoy an addictive clicker game with a classy, playful hostess who knows how to tease at 30,000 feet.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
